title: Add Two Numbers
description:
You are given two non-empty linked lists representing two non-negative integers.
The digits are stored in **reverse order**, one digit per node. Add the two
numbers and return the sum as a linked list, also in reverse order.

Lists are given/returned as arrays of digits.
constraints: No leading zeros except the number 0 itself.

solutions.summary: Walk both lists once, tracking a carry like grade-school addition.

steps.title: Set up a dummy head and carry
steps.explanation: A dummy node simplifies appending; `carry` holds the overflow between digits.

steps.title: Add digit by digit
steps.explanation: While either list or a carry remains, sum the two digits plus carry, append `total % 10`, and keep `total // 10`.
